Class BasicFailoverExecution<T>

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.core.BasicFailoverExecution<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the return type of the protected method
All Implemented Interfaces:
FailoverExecution<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ResilienceFailoverExecution
public class BasicFailoverExecution<T> extends Object implements FailoverExecution<T>
Basic FailoverExecution that invokes the supplier, stores the result on success, and attempts recovery via the FailoverHandler on any exception.
Author:
Anand Manissery

    • BasicFailoverExecution

  • Method Details

    • execute

      public T execute(Failover failover, Supplier<T> supplier, Method method, List<Object> args)
      Description copied from interface: FailoverExecution
      Executes the given supplier with failover protection.
      Specified by:
      execute in interface FailoverExecution<T>
      Parameters:
      failover - annotation metadata for the failover point
      supplier - the actual method invocation to execute
      method - the reflected method, used for logging and type resolution
      args - resolved method arguments
      Returns:
      the result from the supplier, or a recovered value on failure

    • decorateSupplier

      protected Supplier<T> decorateSupplier(Failover failover, Supplier<T> supplier, List<Object> args)
      Extension point for subclasses to wrap the supplier (e.g. to add context propagation). This base implementation is a pass-through.
      Parameters:
      failover - annotation metadata for the failover point
      supplier - the supplier to optionally wrap
      args - method arguments
      Returns:
      the (possibly wrapped) supplier
